name: px4_nuttx_ra8p1_multicore
description: Expert skill for PX4 Autopilot and NuttX BSP development on Renesas RA8/RA8P1 multi-core platforms (Cortex-M85)

core_principles.architecture: 4-layer BSP: PX4 board → PX4 platform → NuttX board → NuttX arch. Minimize invasiveness: prefer config over code, PX4 fixes over NuttX changes.
core_principles.multi_core: RA8P1 supports dual-core (Core0/Core1). Use MSTP for peripheral clock gating, ICU/ELC for interrupt routing, understand core-specific IRQ vectors (ra8p1_irq.h).
core_principles.validation: Build with 'make renesas_evk-ra8p1_default'. Test: sensor status, listener topics, arm/disarm, HRT precision, PWM output.

hardware_mapping.timers: GPT0→HRT, GPT3/5/11/13→PWM/DShot (4 motors). HRT_TIMER_FREQUENCY = BOARD_PCLKD_FREQUENCY / prescaler.
hardware_mapping.sensors: ICM20948 (SPI0, DRDY interrupt), AK09916 (embedded mag), BMP388 (I2C1, 0x76/0x77). Configure bus IDs, CS pins, I2C addresses.
hardware_mapping.buses: SPI: mode/freq per datasheet. I2C: open-drain SCL/SDA with external pull-ups. Match bus indices in init.c and board_config.h.
hardware_mapping.gpio: Use RA8 GPIO macros with correct alternate functions. Configure DRDY/interrupt pins via ICU/ELC.
hardware_mapping.adc: Battery monitoring via ADC channels. Map correctly in board_config.h.

nuttx_arch: platforms/nuttx/NuttX/nuttx/arch/arm/src/ra8/{ra_<driver>.c, ra_<driver>.h, ra_mstp.*, ra_icu.*, ra_clock.*, ra_gpio.*, ra_dmac.*, ra_dtc.*}

common_fixes.SPI-1: Bus index mismatch: px4_spibus_initialize(X) must match PX4_SPI_BUS_SENSORS in board_config.h and rc.board_sensors '-b X'.
common_fixes.BC-2: Missing GPIO macros: Define GPIO_PWM_GPTX_Y_Z in board_config.h with correct alternate function for RA8 pins.
common_fixes.TIM-1: Timer inconsistency: Ensure io_timers[] in io_timer_hw_description.h matches timer_config.cpp and HRT doesn't conflict.
common_fixes.RST-1: Missing board_system_reset(): Implement in init.c for reboot functionality.
common_fixes.BC-1: HRT frequency mismatch: Validate HRT_TIMER_FREQUENCY = (BOARD_PCLKD_FREQUENCY / GPT_prescaler). Document clock tree.
common_fixes.LED-1: LED polarity: Check active-high vs active-low in board_config.h.
common_fixes.ADC-1: ADC channel mapping: Verify channels in board_config.h match hardware schematic.
common_fixes.DEF-2: Watchdog config: Configure or disable in defconfig/Kconfig.

startup_sequence.rc.board_sensors: Sensor startup with correct syntax: 'icm20948 start -s -b 0' (SPI), 'bmp388 start -I -b 1 -a 0x76' (I2C).

multi_core_specifics.core_separation: Core0 typically runs NuttX+PX4, Core1 can run offload tasks. Define core-specific linker sections in evk-ra8p1.ld.
multi_core_specifics.irq_routing: Use ra8p1_irq.h for IRQ vector definitions. Configure ICU/ELC for interrupt routing to correct core.
multi_core_specifics.clock_gating: Use ra_mstp.c/h for MSTP (Module Stop) control. Enable peripheral clocks before use, gate when idle.
multi_core_specifics.ipc: For inter-core communication, use shared memory regions (define in linker script) or RA8 IPC peripherals (if available).
multi_core_specifics.dma_dtc: Use ra_dmac.c/h (DMA Controller) or ra_dtc.c/h (Data Transfer Controller) for offloading data movement.

reference_patterns.hrt_implementation: Follow platforms/nuttx/src/px4/nxp/imxrt/hrt/hrt.c for HRT structure: init, ISR, absolute_time, callout queue.
reference_patterns.sensor_integration: Reference other PX4 boards (e.g., fmu-v5, fmu-v6) for sensor startup scripts and driver configuration.
reference_patterns.ra8_family: Check RA8E1 BSP (if available) for RA8 family-specific patterns.

build_system.configs: .px4board files (default, dshot, test), CMakeLists.txt, Kconfig, defconfig
build_system.dependencies: Understand module dependencies, platform-specific compilation flags.

coding_standards.style: K&R indentation, clear comments, minimal diffs.
coding_standards.documentation: Document clock relationships, hardware mappings (e.g., 'GPT3 → Motor 1, P401'), design decisions.
coding_standards.traceability: Group diffs by issue ID, maintain clear issue-to-fix mapping.

quick_examples.solution: In init.c: px4_spibus_initialize(0). In board_config.h: PX4_SPI_BUS_SENSORS=0. In rc.board_sensors: 'icm20948 start -s -b 0'.
In board_config.h: PX4_I2C_BUS_ONBOARD=1. In i2c.cpp: configure I2C1 with open-drain GPIO. In rc.board_sensors: 'bmp388 start -I -b 1 -a 0x76'.
In hrt.c: use GPT0, set prescaler. In board_config.h: HRT_TIMER_FREQUENCY = BOARD_PCLKD_FREQUENCY / prescaler. Follow imxrt/hrt/hrt.c structure.
In timer_config.cpp: map GPT3/5/11/13 to outputs 1-4. In io_timer_hw_description.h: define io_timers[]. In board_config.h: GPIO_TIM3_CH1OUT = GPIO_PWM_GPT3_A_2.
In evk-ra8p1.ld: define Core0/Core1 memory sections. In board_config.h: configure MSTP for core-specific peripherals. In ra8p1_irq.h: route IRQs to correct core via ICU.
